creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Mon May 26 14:01:55 2014
New Revision: 355348
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355348
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355348/

Log:
  - Update to 1.6.3 [1]
  - Update LICENSE
  
  PR:		ports/190261 [1]
  Submitted by:	Eero Hanninen <fax@nohik.ee> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/py-python-statsd/Makefile
  head/devel/py-python-statsd/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/py-python-statsd/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-python-statsd/Makefile	Mon May 26 13:55:51 2014	(r355347)
+++ head/devel/py-python-statsd/Makefile	Mon May 26 14:01:55 2014	(r355348)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	python-statsd
-PORTVERSION=	1.6.2
+PORTVERSION=	1.6.3
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 MAINTAINER=	fax@nohik.ee
 COMMENT=	Statsd is a client for Etsy's node-js statsd server
 
-LICENSE=	BSD
+LICENSE=	BSD3CLAUSE
 
 USE_PYTHON=		yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes

Modified: head/devel/py-python-statsd/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-python-statsd/distinfo	Mon May 26 13:55:51 2014	(r355347)
+++ head/devel/py-python-statsd/distinfo	Mon May 26 14:01:55 2014	(r355348)

+SHA256 (python-statsd-1.6.3.tar.gz) = e03a0bd86e9565c5742f158d123d691dece09b66984cb2d90ee106136f95a793
+SIZE (python-statsd-1.6.3.tar.gz) = 9375
